reviews.comment:
Un solo playero y por eso se forman filas eternas para cargar nafta. Los baños están cerrados, le tenés que pedir la llave ... Al playero!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Only one beach attendant, so there are endless lines to fill up with gas. The bathrooms are locked; you have to ask the beach attendant for the key!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQc3RhUXhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Divina la plaza central ♥️

(Translated by Google)
The central square is divine ♥️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQMDlIWHRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante lento el servicio. Cargan de un auto a la vez. Estuve 30 minutos en total. Además, siendo socio del club, quería pagar con la tarjeta de mi mujer pero como no coincide con el número de socio, no pude obtener el descuento. No tenían nafta infinia.

(Translated by Google)
The service was quite slow. They only fill one car at a time. I was there for a total of 30 minutes. Also, as a club member, I wanted to pay with my wife's card, but since it didn't match the membership number, I couldn't get the discount. They didn't have Infinia gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQOWFxNWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lentos para atender, como siempre. Colas para cargar nafta en 4 autos

(Translated by Google)
Slow service, as always. Four cars lined up to fill up with gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzdWUzOW9BRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Very good, clean bathrooms

reviews.comment:
Pocos playeros, pero buena atencion. Mucha espera en la mañana y en la noche, recomiendo ir en la siesta o con paciencia.

(Translated by Google)
Few beachgoers, but good service. There's a long wait in the morning and at night. I recommend going during the siesta or with patience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzcjdPUlJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena ubicación, atención.

(Translated by Google)
Good location, good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzZzdma0hnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, sanitarios limpios, y se desayuna muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean restrooms, and a very good breakfast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzbnR1SE13EAE

reviews.comment:
Fuimos a merendar y me encanto el servicio y cordialidad del personal, pcios muy buenos, cafe excelente!!! ( Justo lo que deseaba..)No me defraudo 👌🏻

(Translated by Google)
We went for a snack and I loved the service and friendliness of the staff, very good prices, excellent coffee!!! (Just what I wanted..) I was not disappointed 👌🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzclBXWDFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion del único playero que ponen a trabajar y no da a basto con la cantidad de autos en determinados días y horarios. Sería bueno que pongan otro Playero!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the only attendant they have working, but he can't keep up with the number of cars on certain days and times. It would be good if they hired another attendant!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzMkxQOUxBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un solo playero a la noche, colas interminables, una vergüenza, falta de respeto. El playero no daba abasto  pero así y todo atendía con una sonrisa y muy amable. Un ejemplo

(Translated by Google)
Only one attendant at night, endless queues, a disgrace, disrespectful. The attendant was overwhelmed, but even so, he served customers with a smile and was very friendly. A good example.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYaTdhbnNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio que trabaja mucho, caímos ahí un viernes por la noche y había una terrible cola para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's a busy gas station; we went there on a Friday night and there was a terrible queue to fill up.
